name: Mary
oracleText:
Flash
When Mary enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Child creature token with lifelink.
Whenever another creature enters the battlefield under your control, you may gain 1 life. If you do, scry 1.
flavorText: "Hail, thou that art highly favoured, the Lord is with thee." — Luke 1:28
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Magnificat" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Favored Among Women

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: This Marian Tissot scene fits the favored-among-women title with a strong sacred focus.
